title: athyrium molle
intro: Athyrium molle, also known as Lady-in-a-Green-Bow, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium molle include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a popular herb in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Athyrium molle can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used as a dried powder in various medicinal formulations.
